name: @aily-project/lib-sparkfun-as3935
author: Elias Santistevan / SparkFun Electronics
description: SparkFun AS3935 闪电检测器 Blockly 库，支持 I2C/SPI、风暴距离、能量、中断和噪声过滤配置。
description_zh_cn: SparkFun AS3935 闪电检测器 Blockly 库，支持 I2C/SPI、风暴距离、能量、中断和噪声过滤配置。
description_en: Blockly wrapper for the SparkFun AS3935 lightning detector.
